question: Will Zelenskyy be re-elected as president of Ukraine in the next election?
textDescription:
The next election is scheduled to be 2024. This bet applies to the next election (even if is a "snap" election or a postponed one).

If Zelenskyy wins after running unopposed I will resolve YES

I will resolve NO if

he runs and is not elected

he does not run for re-election

In the case of a disputed election, I will go with whoever the EU declares as having won (unfair, perhaps, but whatever.)
newsShortReason: Zelenskyy did not run in the 2024 Ukrainian presidential election.
newsKeyEvidence: Zelenskyy did not run in the 2024 Ukrainian presidential election. | EU rejected Russian claims of Zelenskyy's illegitimacy in May 2024. | EU approved opening of formal accession negotiations with Ukraine in June 2024. | Zelenskyy signed a security pact with the EU in June 2024. | Zelenskyy addressed the European Parliament in November 2024.
